channel.title: Indira Meka | Blog
channel.description: Stories from my travels, garden, and entrepreneurial journey.

item.title: From No Dreams to Building Them: My Unexpected Journey into Entrepreneurship
item.description: I didn't grow up dreaming of becoming an entrepreneur. There was no grand vision—just curiosity, hobbies, and a willingness to try things. Here's how a fixer-upper changed everything.

item.title: Chasing Wonders: From a Song to Six (and One More to Go)
item.description: It started with a song—and a quiet dream to one day stand at each of the New Seven Wonders. Six checked off, one still waiting. Here's the journey so far.

item.title: How Growing My Own Tomatoes Ruined Store-Bought Ones
item.description: Growing has always been my passion — but I didn't expect it to ruin tomatoes for me. Once you've had a real tomato, there's no going back.

item.title: The Art of Slow Travel: Less Places, More Meaning
item.description: In a world obsessed with bucket lists, I've discovered the transformative power of staying longer and going deeper.
